EmailTemplate.name: Additional Information Required
EmailTemplate.subject: Canaccede - In the Matter of Estate Number "{!Insolvency__r.Name}" and Account Number: "{!Insolvency_Account__c.Name}"
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Sir / Madam,
As you are aware, Canaccede International Management Ltd is processing Bank of Nova Scotia insolvent accounts.
We have received your package and Bank of Nova Scotia has requested some additional information on the account listed.
Please be advised that BNS is not able to locate the debtor, please provide us with the account #, VIN and/or SIN #.
If any errors occurred in the transmission of the attachment, please contact Canaccede at; Email: SBInsolvency@Canaccede.com Facsimile: 844-827.9220 Telephone: 844-827. 9222
Thank You, Canaccede Insolvency Processing
